title: The Starved One
description: This mod adds an entity that stalks the player until the player angers it.
body:
## 📖 What does this mod add? 📖
This mod **Currently** adds a monster driven by hunger and hatred, it feeds on souls of it's victims who were unfortunate to cross paths with it.

## 🔧 Overhaul Coming Soon 🔧
Expect an improved Model, Overhauled Behavior, New Spawning Mechanic, New Sounds, New Blocks and Items.

All of this will be in version 1.0.0**R**
## 👀 Other Websites Where To Download 👀

Inspired by the original [Cave Dweller Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller) (credits to gargin also)
 
Check it out on MCreator: [MCreator Page](https://mcreator.net/modification/110833/starved-one)

Check it out on Curseforge: [Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-starved-one)

## 🧩 Dependencies 🧩

This Mod Requires Geckolib
[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
